2604.08952.title: MAB-DQA: Addressing Query Aspect Importance in Document Question Answering with Multi-Armed Bandits
2604.08952.paper_summary: Document Question Answering (DQA) involves generating answers from a document based on a user's query, representing a key task in document understanding. This task requires interpreting visual layouts, which has prompted recent studies to adopt multimodal Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) that processes page images for answer generation. However, in multimodal RAG, visual DQA struggles to utilize a large number of images effectively, as the retrieval stage often retains only a few candidate pages (e.g., Top-4), causing informative but less visually salient content to be overlooked in favor of common yet low-information pages. To address this issue, we propose a Multi-Armed Bandit-based DQA framework (MAB-DQA) to explicitly model the varying importance of multiple implicit aspects in a query. Specifically, MAB-DQA decomposes a query into aspect-aware subqueries and retrieves an aspect-specific candidate set for each. It treats each subquery as an arm and uses preliminary reasoning results from a small number of representative pages as reward signals to estimate aspect utility. Guided by an exploration-exploitation policy, MAB-DQA dynamically reallocates retrieval budgets toward high-value aspects. With the most informative pages and their correlations, MAB-DQA generates the expected results. On four benchmarks, MAB-DQA shows an average improvement of 5%-18% over the state-of-the-art method, consistently enhancing document understanding. Code at https://github.com/ElephantOH/MAB-DQA.
2604.08952.paper_summary_zh: 文件問題回答（DQA）涉及根據用戶查詢從文檔中生成答案，這是文檔理解中的一個關鍵任務。<lb/>這項任務需要解釋視覺佈局，這促使最近的研究採用多模態檢索增強生成（RAG），該方法處理頁面圖像以生成答案。<lb/>然而，在多模態RAG中，視覺DQA在有效利用大量圖像方面面臨挑戰，因為檢索階段通常僅保留少數候選頁面（例如，Top-4），導致有信息但視覺上不突出的內容被忽視，而偏向於常見但低信息的頁面。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們提出了一種基於多臂賭博機的DQA框架（MAB-DQA），以明確建模查詢中多個隱含方面的變化重要性。<lb/>具體而言，MAB-DQA將查詢分解為關注方面的子查詢，並為每個子查詢檢索一組特定於方面的候選集。<lb/>它將每個子查詢視為一個臂，並使用來自少數代表性頁面的初步推理結果作為獎勵信號來估計方面效用。<lb/>在探索-利用策略的指導下，MAB-DQA動態重新分配檢索預算，以便集中於高價值方面。<lb/>通過最具信息的頁面及其相關性，MAB-DQA生成預期的結果。<lb/>在四個基準測試中，MAB-DQA的平均改進幅度為5%-18%，持續提升文檔理解。<lb/>代碼位於 https://github.com/ElephantOH/MAB-DQA。
2604.08952.author: Yixin Xiang et.al.
2604.08952.authors: Yixin Xiang, Yunshan Ma, Xiaoyu Du, Yibing Chen, Yanxin Zhang, Jinhui Tang
